analysis.ambiguity1: "This needs to be exclusive.": The term "exclusive" is vague because it does not clearly define the eligibility requirements beyond restricting access. It is unclear whether exclusivity means only current students, alumni, faculty, or anyone with a .edu email address.
analysis.ambiguity2: "I want to be able to auction items, not just set a fixed price.": The auction requirement lacks important details such as bidding rules, auction duration, minimum bid increments, reserve prices, and how a winning bidder is selected.
